segment_definitions.description: Segment the video into editorial shots or visually continuous camera units. Treat dissolves and fades as transition intervals when possible.

fields.name: purpose
fields.description: The likely audience-facing purpose of the shot, without claiming private creator intent

segment_definitions.description: Find moments where a performer's objective, attention, visible affect display, posture, or action state changes in a way that matters to the audience.

fields.name: high_fps_review
fields.description: Whether rapid action or microexpression requires frame-level review

segment_definitions.description: Find executable physical action units and interaction events. Use staged-action terms and distinguish confirmed contact, near-contact, occluded contact, and unknown contact.

fields.name: action
fields.description: Action atom such as step_in, pivot, strike_like_motion, dodge, recoil, fall, recovery, reach, grab_like_motion, release

fields.name: presentation_amplifiers
fields.description: Camera, edit, sound, or VFX cues that amplify the action

segment_definitions.description: For creator, advertisement, or product content, segment the communication into audience-facing functions. Do not claim that a function guarantees sales.

fields.name: spoken_claim
fields.description: Brief paraphrase of the spoken or written claim

fields.name: visual_proof
fields.description: What is shown as proof or demonstration

fields.name: gaze_relation
fields.description: Creator relation to lens or object

segment_definitions.description: Find stylized visual or temporal enhancements rather than ordinary photographed motion.

fields.name: target
fields.description: Actor, object, region, or event affected

segment_definitions.description: Find intervals where the video supports two or more materially different explanations relevant to reverse compilation.

fields.name: uncertainty_source
fields.description: Occlusion, low sampling, blur, edit, depth ambiguity, or other cause

fields.name: recommended_measurement
fields.description: Pose, flow, high-FPS clip, audio transient, camera solve, or human review needed

adapter_notes: Submit no more than ten definitions in a request and keep each definition focused.
Pin the SDK, API, and model versions and re-check current provider documentation.
Parse result.data as JSON and retain finish_reason and errors.
Provider segment boundaries are semantic proposals; fuse them with source-clock detectors.
